Chapter 8

  1. 1וַ/יְדַבֵּ֥רva/y.da.Berand/ he spokeיְהוָ֖הYah.wehYahwehאֶל\־'el-toמֹשֶׁ֥הmo.ShehMosesלֵּ/אמֹֽר\׃le./Mor<to>/ saying
